VIP only

You are invited.

Hi Alice Love!

We're excited to invite you to the official launch of Rapid Fire, our brand new online store! We’re proud to finally open our virtual doors and share our collection with you.

Enter the code below to access our shop:

Access Code: RF2026

Shop Now

Loyalty Rewards

Earn cash back and unlock free shipping every time you shop — no sign-ups, no punch cards. Your rewards are calculated automatically at checkout.

1. First-Time Customer.

New to the store? You get free shipping on your first order when your cart reaches $49 or more. It's our way of saying welcome.

2. Cash Back Tiers.

The more you add to your cart, the more you earn back — automatically issued as store credit after your order ships.
